block_05: Ichimoku Cloud: An Indicator to Identify Market Trends
block_06: Ichimoku Cloud indicator is a technical analysis instrument that belongs to the category of trend indicators. Keep reading to find out how to choose the Ichimoku Cloud settings and learn about different ways to apply this tool in trading.
block_08: Dual Stochastic + KAMA Binary Options Strategy
block_09: If you are looking for an effective binary options strategy, Dual Stochastic combined with the Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average strategy might be the one for you. Keep reading to discover how this strategy may help catch the right moment to open a trade.
